title: Real-World Agent And Skill Repos Directory
purpose: Study real-world agent and skill repositories to learn how to identify problems that can be turned into agentic workflows.
selection_rule: Prefer repos that package a real professional workflow, domain procedure, or repeatable output artifact. Generic agent frameworks are included only when they explain the skill format or directory pattern.

problem_fit_rubric.question: Does a real person repeat this workflow often enough that a reusable agent skill would save time?
Can the workflow start from files, links, forms, records, APIs, tickets, docs, or other inspectable inputs?
Is there a checklist, policy, standard, rubric, protocol, or expert sequence the agent can follow?
Can the agent call tools, search sources, parse files, run scripts, query APIs, or generate a deterministic artifact?
Can success be checked with citations, tests, diffs, scores, status labels, human review, or another audit trail?
Can the agent stop before irreversible, clinical, legal, financial, or customer-facing commitments?
Can this be written as one SKILL.md plus optional scripts, templates, references, and examples?

repos.name: anthropics/skills
repos.problem_pattern: Give agents reusable instructions and assets for tasks that require more than a one-off prompt.
repos.what_to_study: Folder structure, SKILL.md convention, progressive disclosure, example packaging.

repos.name: agentskills/agentskills
repos.problem_pattern: Define a portable file format for skill packages across agent systems.
repos.what_to_study: Spec-level requirements for SKILL.md, assets, scripts, and distribution.

metadata.description: Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

repos.name: VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills
repos.problem_pattern: Curate real-world agent skills from official teams and community projects.
repos.what_to_study: How skills are grouped by domain, platform, and use case.

metadata.description: A curated collection of 1000+ agent skills from official dev teams and the community, compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and more.

repos.name: block/agent-skills
repos.problem_pattern: Package reusable agent skills as a marketplace for practical work.
repos.what_to_study: How a company frames reusable skills for portability and team use.

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.problem_pattern: Turn repeatable engineering workflows into production-grade agent skills.
repos.what_to_study: Skill anatomy, verification discipline, and process-over-knowledge framing.

metadata.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

repos.name: Aperivue/verify-refs
repos.problem_pattern: Catch fabricated or mismatched references before peer review.
repos.what_to_study: One painful professional task packaged as an audit-only skill with external source checks.

metadata.description: Catch fabricated and mismatched citations before peer review - audit-only reference verification against PubMed and CrossRef.

repos.name: Aperivue/check-reporting
repos.problem_pattern: Audit a manuscript against reporting guidelines and label each item present, partial, or missing.
repos.what_to_study: Guideline checklist workflow, status labels, and expert review artifact.

metadata.description: Audit a medical manuscript against 32 EQUATOR reporting guidelines.

repos.name: Aperivue/medsci-skills
repos.problem_pattern: Support literature search, reporting checks, citation checks, statistics, publication figures, and submission.
repos.what_to_study: How one umbrella repo can hold separate hero skills without becoming one vague mega-agent.

metadata.description: Agent Skills for medical research - literature search, reporting-guideline and citation checks, statistics, publication figures, submission.

repos.name: NVIDIA/digital-health-skills
repos.real_world_domain: healthcare AI evaluation and model adaptation
repos.problem_pattern: Guide healthcare AI workflows such as evaluation, data generation, model adaptation, deployment, and clinical ASR improvement.
repos.what_to_study: Evaluation-first framing and metric-driven healthcare AI workflows.

metadata.description: NVIDIA Digital Health skills repo for agent-guided healthcare AI workflows, including evaluation, data generation, model adaptation, deployment guidance, and developer best practices.

repos.name: ajhcs/healthcare-agents
repos.problem_pattern: Package specialist agents for administrative healthcare workflows.
repos.what_to_study: How healthcare admin roles map into prompts, agents, and optional SKILL.md packages.

metadata.description: Portable prompt and SKILL.md pack with 51 specialist AI agents for US healthcare administration workflows.

repos.name: awslabs/hcls-agent-skills
repos.real_world_domain: healthcare claims, genomics, imaging, drug discovery, and life sciences
repos.problem_pattern: Apply skills to regulated healthcare and life-sciences workflows where domain process matters.
repos.what_to_study: How a cloud/vendor lab frames multi-domain HCLS skills for platform portability.

metadata.description: Agent skills for healthcare and life sciences: genomics, imaging, claims, drug discovery, and more.

repos.name: aipoch/medical-research-skills
repos.problem_pattern: Provide many medical research skills for protocol design, data analysis, evidence insights, and academic writing.
repos.what_to_study: Breadth of medical workflows and how to split research work into skill modules.

metadata.description: Hundreds of agent skills for medical research, including protocol design, data analysis, evidence insights, and academic writing.

repos.name: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
repos.real_world_domain: science, medicine, chemistry, biology, geospatial science, and data analysis
repos.problem_pattern: Turn scientific workflows and database lookups into reusable agent skills.
repos.what_to_study: How specialized databases, APIs, and computational tools can be wrapped into task-specific skills.

metadata.description: Turn any AI agent into an AI Scientist.

repos.name: FreedomIntelligence/OpenClaw-Medical-Skills
repos.problem_pattern: Aggregate many medical AI skills into one open-source library.
repos.what_to_study: Large-scale skill-library organization, but verify quality and licensing before reuse.

metadata.description: The largest open-source medical AI skills library for OpenClaw.

repos.name: davila7/claude-code-templates
repos.real_world_domain: Claude Code configuration and domain skills
repos.problem_pattern: Provide installable templates and skills, including a pydicom skill for medical imaging files.
repos.what_to_study: The pydicom skill as a narrow file-processing workflow: read, anonymize, inspect, and convert DICOM files.

metadata.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

repos.name: mapbox/mapbox-agent-skills
repos.problem_pattern: Help agents perform Mapbox-specific geospatial product and engineering workflows.
repos.what_to_study: Domain-specific SDK/product constraints, token safety, performance, and map workflow guidance.

repos.name: product-on-purpose/pm-skills
repos.real_world_domain: product discovery, design sprint, and PM workflows
repos.problem_pattern: Package repeatable product-management methods into plug-and-play skills, templates, workflows, and subagents.
repos.what_to_study: How non-coding business workflows become skills with templates, examples, and phase structure.

metadata.description: 67 plug-and-play, best-practice, product management skills for AI agents.
